title: Non-orientable Lagrangian surfaces in rational 4-manifolds
author_string: Bo Dai, Chung-I Ho, Tian-Jun Li
abstract: We show that for any nonzero class $A$ in $H_2(X; \mathbb{Z}_2)$ in a rational 4-manifold $X$, $A$ is represented by a nonorientable embedded Lagrangian surface L (for some symplectic structure) if and only if $P(A)\equiv (L) (mod\ 4)$; where $P(A)$ denotes the mod 4 valued Pontrjagin square of $A$.
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures, to appear in Algebraic and Geometric Topology
